description: Desiderio is free under GPL-2.0, forever. Creator Care puts the people who built all 255 elements on your team — every month, without hiring.

feature_items.text: 4 development hours from the creators, every month
Priority fixes — your issues jump the queue
Security monitoring for core, extensions, and Desiderio
TYPO3 LTS upgrade planning, so no release surprises you
Editor onboarding workshop (book the half-day remote session for €690)
